title: Sable: Weighted - Create: TFMG
body:
Adds full block physics weighting for The Factory Must Grow when using the Sable physics system.

---

**Features**
- Complete coverage of T.F.M.G. blocks
- Mass scaling across all machines and parts
- Form-based weighting (components, decor, cogwheels, etc.)
- Adjusted volume for partial blocks (slabs, stairs)
- Lightweight handling for thin geometry (bars, ladders, etc.)
- Consistent behavior across decorative and structural elements

---

**Installation:**
Simply place this mod jar inside your `mods` folder
